name: sylqon-desktop
description: Sylqon desktop shell — read-only Electron wrapper around the local Sylqon web UI, plus an always-on-top in-game overlay window.
author: Sylqon

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:backend && npm run build:main && electron-builder
scripts.pack: npm run clean && npm run build:backend && npm run build:main && electron-builder --dir
